widgets.comments: Send out a Midi channel number over CC 120. This can be used to tell a Midi client to set it's receiving channel.
Read-only mapped value display. Adjust outMin/outMax in value formula per knob as needed.
widgets.value: JS{{ return @{knob_R1}.toFixed(0); }}
JS{{ return @{knob_R1}.toFixed(0); }}

widgets.comments: Read-only mapped value display. Adjust outMin/outMax in value formula per knob as needed.
Read-only mapped value display. Adjust outMin/outMax in value formula per knob as needed.
widgets.value: JS{{ const midi = Number(@{knob_1} || 0); const outMin = 0; const outMax = 127; return (outMin + (midi / 127) * (outMax - outMin)).toFixed(0); }}
